ui1Zoom.name: Quick Picker: Zoom Level
ui1Zoom.hint: Scale factor applied to images inside each cell. Values above 1.0 crop and enlarge.

ui1ZoomOrigin.name: Quick Picker: Zoom Origin
ui1ZoomOrigin.hint: Which part of the image stays centred when zoomed. No visible effect at 1.0.

ui2CellWidth.name: Window: Cell Width
ui2CellWidth.hint: Width in pixels of each image cell in the picker window

ui2CellHeight.name: Window: Cell Height
ui2CellHeight.hint: Height in pixels of each image cell in the picker window

ui2DefaultCols.name: Window: Default Columns
ui2DefaultCols.hint: Number of columns on first open

ui2DefaultRows.name: Window: Default Rows
ui2DefaultRows.hint: Number of rows on first open

ui2Zoom.name: Window: Zoom Level
ui2Zoom.hint: Scale factor applied to images inside each cell. Values above 1.0 crop and enlarge.

ui2ZoomOrigin.name: Window: Zoom Origin
ui2ZoomOrigin.hint: Which part of the image stays centred when zoomed. No visible effect at 1.0.

thumbCleaner.name: Clear Thumbnails
thumbCleaner.label: Open Thumbnail Cleaner
thumbCleaner.hint: Remove cached thumbnails for a wildcard path so they are regenerated on next use.

ui2ShowMetaOverlay.name: Window: Show Metadata Overlay
ui2ShowMetaOverlay.hint: Display a small badge on image cells (name, size, scale).

ui2GroupNameEnabled.name: Window: Group by Name Tag
ui2GroupNameEnabled.hint: When enabled, files sharing the same _name_value_ tag are grouped together (if enough exist). Explicit _group_ tags always group regardless of this setting.

ui2GroupNameMinCount.name: Window: Name Group Minimum
ui2GroupNameMinCount.hint: Minimum number of files a name group must contain to be shown as a group. Files in smaller groups are placed in Ungrouped.

ui2GroupCollapseMode.name: Window: Group Selection Behaviour
ui2GroupCollapseMode.hint: What happens when a group is selected from the dropdown.

ui2GroupLayoutCols.name: Window: Group Layout Columns
ui2GroupLayoutCols.hint: Arrange groups side-by-side in equal columns. Groups with many images automatically span all columns.

ui2GroupBalanceRows.name: Window: Balance Orphan Rows
ui2GroupBalanceRows.hint: When a group's last row is less than half full, the column count is increased slightly so images are spread more evenly. Cells may shrink up to 30% to make room.

tokenConfig.browse: Browse to a file (then add wildcards manually)

notifications.noImages: Token Slurp: no images found for this wildcard path.
notifications.noWildcard: Token Slurp: the selected token has no active wildcard path.
notifications.followNoActor: Token Slurp: current token has no actor or wildcard path to match against.
notifications.followNoMatch: Token Slurp: no matching token found in the active scene.
notifications.followMultiple: Token Slurp: multiple matching tokens found — cannot determine which one to follow.
notifications.tokenDeleted: Token Slurp: tracked token got deleted. Select or track new one.

thumbCleaner.title: Thumbnail Cleaner
thumbCleaner.instructions: Enter a wildcard path to find and regenerate its cached thumbnails. Source image files are never modified or overwritten.
thumbCleaner.noneFound: No cached thumbnails found for that path.
thumbCleaner.error: An error occurred while searching. Check the console for details.
